content:
The user wants me to extract the content of the image into a JSON format. **1. Analyze the image:** The image is a technical datasheet page for a Murata component, specifically the GRM21BR71C105KA01. It contains: - Header information: Part number, title, and page number. - A product specification notice. - A reference section with links to product information. - A diagram explaining the "MURATA Part No. System". - A diagram showing "Type & Dimension". - A table for "Size Code". - A table for "Rated Value". - A table for "Package". **2. Break down the content into logical sections:** * **Header:** * Part Number: GRM21BR71C105KA01_(2012M(0805), X7R(EIA), 1µF, DC 16V) * Title: :Package * Logo: muRata * Reference Sheet * **Product Specification Notice:** * "Product specifications in this catalog are as of Jan.9.2025, and are subject to change or obsolescence without notice. Please consult the approval sheet before ordering. Please read rating and !Cautions first." * **Reference Section:** * " Please kindly use our website." * "Please refer to the product information page for more information on ceramic capacitors. → Ceramic capacitor product information" * "Various data can be obtained directly from the product search. → Product search (SMD)" * **MURATA Part No. System:** * This is a diagram showing how to read the part number. * (Ex.) GRM * ①Series * 21 * ②Dimension (L×W) * B * ③Dimension (T) * R7 * ④Temperature Characteristics * 1C * ⑤Rated Voltage * 105 * ⑥Capacitance * K * ⑦Capacitance Tolerance * A01 * ⑧Individual Specification * L * ⑨Package * **Type & Dimension:** * A 3D diagram of a capacitor with dimensions labeled W, L, T, e, g. * "image:Dimension" * **Size Code Table:** * Size Code : 2012M(0805) * (in mm) * Columns: ② L, ② W, ③ T, e, g * Rows: 2.0+/-0.1, 1.25+/-0.1, 1.25+/-0.1, 0.2 to 0.7, 0.7 min. * **Rated Value Table:** * Columns: * ④Temperature Characteristics [R7] (Public STD Code : [X7R(EIA)]) * ⑤Rated Voltage * ⑥Capacitance * ⑦Capacitance Tolerance * Operating Temp. Range * Mounting Method * Rows: * Temp. coeff. or Cap. Change, Temp. Range, Ref.Temp. * -15 to 15 %, -55 to 125°C, 25°C, DC 16V, 1µF, +/-10%, -55 to 125°C, Flow, Reflow * **Individual Specification Note:** * "©Individual Specification : This denotes Murata control code." * **Package Table:** * Columns: ⑨Package, Packaging, Standard Packing Quantity * Rows: * L, φ180mm Reel Plastic Tape W8P4, 3000 pcs./Reel * K, φ330mm Reel Plastic Tape W8P4, 10000 pcs./Reel * **Footer:** * Part Number: GRM21BR71C105KA01-01A * Page Number: 2 **3. Please consult the approval sheet before ordering.
